mangaDetails.authorSelector: div.flex.items-center:contains(Tác giả) a, div.flex.items-center:contains(Tác giả) span:last-child
mangaDetails.statusSelector: div.flex.items-center:contains(Trạng thái) a, div.flex.items-center:contains(Trạng thái) span:last-child

mangaDetails.genreSelector: p.tip:contains(Từ khóa) span a, .detail-main-info-class span a
